_comment: Theme-aware ambient transition sounds. Each theme maps to an ambient MP3 file placed in the ambient/ directory. These play as brief atmospheric transitions between segments (3-5 seconds, faded). If a theme's file is missing, falls back to the standard interval music. Generate ambient clips with any AI audio tool (Ludo, ElevenLabs SFX, Suno, etc.) or source from freesound.org under CC0.

Arts, Culture & Digital Storytelling.description: Soft acoustic guitar or gentle piano — creative, warm

Working Lands & Industry.description: Distant machinery hum, wind across open fields

Community Tech & Governance.description: Quiet office ambience, soft keyboard clicks, civic tone

Indigenous Lands & Innovation.description: Gentle wind through pines, subtle water sounds — respectful and grounded

Cariboo Voices & Local News.description: Gentle small-town morning — distant traffic, birds, coffee shop warmth

Resilient Rural Futures.description: Soft electronic hum with natural undertones — tech meets nature
